ksa_text: Knowledge of human-AI interaction governance, including human oversight architecture design, human-in-the-loop and human-on-the-loop patterns, human-machine interface requirements for AI oversight, and trust calibration mechanisms appropriate to different risk levels.

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

top_anchors.element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA AG-K-010 (AI Governance/Knowledge) is excluded as out_of_scope (composite 0.493, highest: NIST AI RMF at 0.493). Core signal: 1, OOS signals: 0, seniority: appropriate. AI Governance at this signal level does not meet inclusion threshold for RLHF Specialist.

pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Exclusion upheld. Market evidence consistent with exclusion. Final decision: exclude.
